summary_en: 300,000 shares (0.83% of shares outstanding), ¥148.2M ceiling, ToSTNeT-3 off-hours execution on 2026-05-25 at ¥494/share (previous day close). Partial block from authorized ¥410M / 410,000-share program (1.14% S/O) with execution window 2026-05-18 to 2026-06-26. Shareholders include director Yoshihiro Kaneko.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury stock via off-hours matching system transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: CREAL Inc. announced on 2026-05-22 that it will acquire 300,000 of its own shares (0.83% of shares outstanding) up to a total of ¥148.2M via a single off-hours ToSTNeT-3 transaction on 2026-05-25 at or below ¥494/share (the previous day's closing price). This block acquisition is part of a broader ¥410M authorised repurchase program (410,000 shares; 1.14% S/O) approved on 2026-05-15 for execution over 2026-05-18 to 2026-06-26 via both ToSTNeT-3 off-hours and ongoing open-market purchases under a discretionary trading agreement. Director and Vice President Yoshihiro Kaneko has indicated his willingness to sell shares in this transaction. The company will announce final results after market close on 2026-05-25.
